---
title: "Effective Study Habits for Anatomy and Physiology"
author: "Jamar Arrington"
format: html
toc: true
---

## Introduction

Anatomy and Physiology (A&P) requires consistent, active study. Memorization alone is not enough—you must **understand structures, functions, and how systems work together**. This tutorial outlines proven study habits to help you succeed in this course.

---

## Step 1: Prepare Before Class

Effective studying begins *before* you enter the classroom.

### Key Actions
